Canada: Independent contractor, incorporated consultant, or temporary contract worker.
India: Contract employee, vendor resource, consultant, or third-party payroll worker.
USA: 1099 contractor, W2 contractor, consultant, or staffing-agency worker.

Canada: May be regulated in professional engineering contexts; broad in software contexts.
India: Often broad for software/technical roles and formal engineering backgrounds.
USA: Broad in software; licensed engineering exists in regulated contexts.

India: Common in IT services, GCC, staffing, RPO, and corporate HR.
USA: Common in corporate and agency recruiting.
